prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains specifically to rough sleeping data for England, as indicated by the referencing of the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government (MHCLG), which is an English government department. It does not provide data or framework applicable to Scotland or any other UK nation.
